_doc: Champion/challenger fleet registry. One perception -> N frozen policy arms. See markdown/specs/FLEET-DESIGN.md. NEVER store API secrets here (git-tracked) -- secrets live in the GITIGNORED automation/state/fleet/secrets.json; key_ref points to the entry there. All account#/equity below confirmed against the live broker 2026-06-20 via validate_keys.py. Baseline to beat: analysis/HONEST-PNL-BASELINE-2026-06-20.md.

arms.hypothesis: THE OPTION TAX IS THE KILLER, NOT THE READ — same directional signal on a linear instrument; if MES captures the move the edge is real and the fix is the instrument.
